---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

Junior Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University with a strong interest in data analysis and analytical thinking. Motivated to learn new methods, work with data, and improve problem-solving skills. I adapt quickly to new environments, communicate effectively, and continuously seek opportunities to develop myself while contributing to meaningful projects.

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

-   Samsun Anatolian Highschool, Turkey, 2018-2022

## Employements

1.  The Corral (Work and Travel), Prep Cook, June 2025-September 2025

## Internships

1.  SAMPA Automative, Production Planning Intern, January 2026- February 2026

# Competencies

SAP,MS Office, AutoCAD,Python, Canva

# Hobbies

Pottery, Tennis, Trekking\
\
You can download my CV from the link below:\
\
[Download my CV](AysenazOzyer-CV.pdf)
